🔄 Pickup & Delivery — Our rider will come to you to collect your laundry, and return it once it's done.
💳 Pickup Security Fee (Non-Refundable): A pickup fee will be collected as a security deposit to confirm your booking. This is non-refundable in case of cancellation.

📲 Once your booking is finalized through our Facebook conversation, we will send you a GCash QR code for payment. Please do not cancel your scheduled pickup after payment.
🧺 Choose Your Service

All services include full Wash · Dry · Fold. The difference is just up to you!

👑 PREMIUM Premium Wash Our original all-in care. We handle everything.
🫧 STANDARD Standard Wash You bring your own liquid detergent & fabcon.
✨ PLUS Standard Wash Plus We provide the detergent & fabcon for you.
👑 Premium Wash — Our Original All-In Care
We sort, pre-wash, wash, dry & fold. All detergents & fabcon included. Charged per kilo — minimum 5 kilos.
What are you washing?
👕 Normal Clothes ₱40/kilo Minimum 5 kilos
🛏️ Flatsheet, Towels & Maong Jeans ₱60/kilo Minimum 5 kilos

⚠️ Final price is based on actual weight at our shop. This is for reference only.

🫧 Standard Wash — You take care of the basics, we'll take care of the rest!
Please bring your own liquid detergent and fabcon. We don't accept powdered detergent.
Choose Load Size
8 Kilo Load₱190Bring your own detergent & fabcon
12 Kilo Load₱250Bring your own detergent & fabcon
📝 A waiver form will be issued during pickup — WashCraft is not liable for color bleeds if items are mixed.
✨ Standard Wash Plus — We take care of the basics, you enjoy the convenience!
Same as Standard Wash but we provide our high-quality liquid detergent and fabcon.

📅 Schedule
⏰ Please note: Pickup time may vary depending on availability and other scheduled pickups. We kindly ask you to allow a 30-minute to 1-hour time difference. Our rider will make sure to update you if there are any changes, including delays due to traffic.
🚚 Please note: Delivery time may change depending on the number of deliveries and laundry orders for the day. We also ask you to allow a 30-minute to 1-hour time difference. Our rider will keep you updated, especially in case of traffic.

💳 Pickup Security Fee Reminder: A non-refundable pickup fee will be required to confirm your booking. After our team finalizes your schedule on Facebook, we will send you a GCash QR code for payment. Please make sure you are ready to proceed before submitting this form.

By submitting this form, you acknowledge our pickup/delivery time policy and the non-refundable security fee. Booking is confirmed only upon our reply and payment confirmation.

💬 Message us on Facebook

📌 What happens next?
Our team will review your booking and confirm your schedule via Facebook or phone.
Once confirmed, we'll send you a GCash QR code for the non-refundable pickup security fee.
Payment confirms your booking. Please avoid cancelling after payment.
